name: Shift brief template
description: Structured briefing template covering demand shape, 86s, live risks, role pressure points, recovery focus, and named escalation ownership.
source_ref: core-v2: leadership rhythm should create shared situational awareness before the shift gets loud
usage_moment: Use at the start of each shift and before major peak windows.
expected_output: A short briefing record with priorities, risks, ownership, and the shift's operational focus.
